mapper.sql: a.id AS "id", a.uid AS "uid", a.eqid AS "eqid", a.acc AS "acc", a.idno AS "idno", a.state AS "state", a.reason AS "reason", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate"
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_zhuxiao( id, uid, eqid, acc, idno, state, reason, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{uid}, #{eqid}, #{acc}, #{idno}, #{state}, #{reason}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_zhuxiao SET uid = #{uid}, eqid = #{eqid}, acc = #{acc}, idno = #{idno}, state = #{state}, reason = #{reason}, update_date = #{updateDate} WHERE id = #{id}
